data.name: Email-SMS-Spam-Classifier
data.description: An end-to-end Email/SMS Spam Classifier utilizing NLP (TF-IDF, Stemming) and Machine Learning, deployed as a live Streamlit web app.

data.name: Movie-Recommendation-System
data.description: An end-to-end Movie Recommender System built with Cosine Similarity modeling and deployed with a clean Streamlit interface.

data.name: Car-Price-Predictor
data.description: A comprehensive Car Price Prediction system built using a Linear Regression pipeline, deployed with Flask and Bootstrap.

data.name: Banglore-House-Price-Predictor
data.description: A Bengaluru House Price Prediction system featuring data cleaning, outlier removal, and a Ridge Regression pipeline, deployed with Flask and Bootstrap.

data.name: Olympic-Analysis
data.description: An interactive Olympic History Analysis dashboard built with Streamlit and Plotly to visualize 120 years of athlete data.

data.name: Customer-Churn-Prediction
data.description: A machine learning pipeline to predict customer churn using telecom customer datasets, feature engineering, and classification models.

data.name: Bert
data.description: An advanced NLP implementation utilizing Google's BERT model and TensorFlow Hub to generate contextual word and sentence embeddings.

data.name: Activation-Function
data.description: A mathematical implementation of core Neural Network Activation Functions (Sigmoid, Tanh, ReLU, Leaky ReLU) from scratch.

data.name: Decision-Tree
data.description: A practical guide and custom implementation of Decision Tree Classification (Information Gain, Gini Impurity).

data.name: Data-augmentation
data.description: A Jupyter Notebook mapping out various data augmentation techniques for training convolutional neural networks.

data.name: Dropout-Regularization
data.description: A practical guide to implementing Dropout Regularization in Keras, comparing overfitted and generalized deep learning models.

data.name: Principal-Component-Analysis
data.description: A deep dive into Dimensionality Reduction using PCA on the 64-dimensional Digits dataset to balance model speed and accuracy.

data.name: Loss-or-Cost-Function
data.description: Python notebook exploring neural network loss functions (Mean Absolute Error, Mean Squared Error, Log Loss/Binary Cross Entropy).

data.name: Matrix-Basics
data.description: A foundational project covering basic matrix operations (addition, dot product) in NumPy for deep learning math.
